name: Apple Mail MCP
description: IMAP-first email management for Apple Mail with 37 tools — IMAP-accelerated search with recipient filtering, cross-account moves, HTML/plain-text composition, bulk operations, smart inbox analytics, folder management, IMAP sorting, and optional read-only mode.

user_preferences.title: Email Preferences
user_preferences.description: Your personal email preferences that will be provided to the AI assistant when using email tools (e.g., 'Default to BCG account, show max 50 emails, prefer Archive folder')

read_only.title: Read-Only Mode
read_only.description: Disable tools that send email. Draft listing, creation, opening, and deletion remain available, but sending is blocked.

tools.name: get_inbox_overview
tools.description: Get a comprehensive dashboard overview of your email inbox status across all accounts. Shows unread counts by account, mailbox structure with unread indicators, preview of recent emails, and provides AI-driven action suggestions.

tools.name: list_inbox_emails
tools.description: List all emails from inbox across all accounts or a specific account. Filter by account name, limit number of emails, and filter read/unread status. Supports JSON output format.

tools.name: get_email_with_content
tools.description: Search for emails by subject keyword and return with full content preview. Search within specific account with configurable content length.

tools.name: get_unread_count
tools.description: Get the count of unread emails for each account. Quick overview of unread emails across all Mail accounts.

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List all available Mail accounts configured in Apple Mail.

tools.name: get_recent_emails
tools.description: Get the most recent emails from a specific account. Optional content preview with configurable count. Supports JSON output format.

tools.name: list_mailboxes
tools.description: List all mailboxes (folders) for a specific account or all accounts. Shows folder structure with optional message counts.

tools.name: move_email
tools.description: Move emails between mailboxes by searching for subject keywords. Supports nested mailboxes with path notation (e.g., 'Projects/Amplify Impact').

tools.name: reply_to_email
tools.description: Reply to emails matching a subject keyword. Send reply or save as draft with custom body and option to reply to all recipients. Supports CC/BCC and attachments.

tools.name: compose_email
tools.description: Compose and send a new email from a specific account. Supports TO, CC, BCC, attachments, open/draft modes, and optional HTML body content.

tools.name: forward_email
tools.description: Forward emails matching a subject keyword to specified recipients. Optionally prepend a custom message. Supports CC/BCC.

tools.name: list_email_attachments
tools.description: List attachments for emails matching a subject keyword. Shows attachment names and sizes.

tools.name: save_email_attachment
tools.description: Save a specific attachment from an email to disk. Validates save path for security — blocks writes to sensitive directories.

tools.name: search_emails
tools.description: Advanced unified email search with multiple filter options. Search by subject keyword, sender, attachment presence, read status, and date ranges. Supports JSON output format.

tools.name: search_emails_advanced
tools.description: Unified search with 12 filter parameters: account, mailbox, subject, body, sender, date range, read status, attachments, flagged status. Supports multi-account search and JSON output.

tools.name: search_by_sender
tools.description: Find emails from a specific sender across mailboxes. Search by sender email address or name.

tools.name: search_all_accounts
tools.description: Cross-account search with advanced filtering. Search across all configured email accounts with date range and sorting.

tools.name: search_email_content
tools.description: Full-text search in email bodies. Find emails containing specific text or phrases in plain text and HTML content.

tools.name: get_newsletters
tools.description: Find newsletter and subscription emails. Identifies newsletter patterns and filters promotional mail.

tools.name: get_recent_from_sender
tools.description: Retrieve recent emails from a specific sender with human-friendly time filters (today, week, month, all).

tools.name: get_email_thread
tools.description: View email conversation threads by finding all related messages. Groups messages with matching subjects across all mailboxes.

tools.name: update_email_status
tools.description: Update email status in batch — mark as read/unread, flag/unflag. Requires at least one filter or explicit apply_to_all for safety.

tools.name: manage_trash
tools.description: Manage email deletion: move_to_trash, delete_permanent, empty_trash. Requires filters for safety. empty_trash requires confirm_empty=True.

tools.name: manage_drafts
tools.description: Complete draft management: list, create, send, open, and delete drafts. Supports full composition parameters (TO, CC, BCC).

tools.name: create_mailbox
tools.description: Create a new mailbox (folder) in a specified account. Supports nested paths and auto-creates parent folders.

tools.name: archive_emails
tools.description: Move emails to Archive mailbox with safety features. Requires filters, dry_run=True by default, only_read=True by default, max 50 cap.

tools.name: mark_emails
tools.description: Batch mark emails as read/unread/flagged/unflagged. Requires at least one filter (subject, sender, or date). Default max 50.

tools.name: delete_emails
tools.description: Soft-delete emails (move to Trash) with safety features. dry_run=True by default, required filters, max 25 limit.

tools.name: bulk_move_emails
tools.description: Batch move emails matching filters to a target mailbox. Supports nested paths, required filters, max 50 limit.

tools.name: get_awaiting_reply
tools.description: Find sent emails that haven't received a reply. Cross-references Sent and Inbox to identify follow-up opportunities.

tools.name: get_needs_response
tools.description: Identify unread emails needing a response. Filters out newsletters and automated senders, assigns priority hints.

tools.name: get_top_senders
tools.description: Rank senders by email frequency. Supports date range filtering and optional grouping by domain.

tools.name: get_statistics
tools.description: Email analytics: account overview, sender stats, or mailbox breakdown. Shows totals, read/unread ratios, top senders.

tools.name: export_emails
tools.description: Export emails to txt or html. Single email or entire mailbox (capped at 1000). Configurable save location.

tools.name: inbox_dashboard
tools.description: Interactive UI dashboard for MCP Apps-compatible clients. Shows account cards, recent emails, and search. Requires mcp-ui-server.

tools.name: sort_inbox
tools.description: Sort inbox emails into folders by sender using IMAP. Fast rule-based sorting for Proton Bridge or other IMAP-accessible accounts. Supports dry-run, batch processing, and auto folder creation.

tools.name: imap_bulk_move
tools.description: Move emails between IMAP folders directly. Fast bulk move for Proton Bridge — useful for folder merging, inbox triage, and sender-based filtering.
